channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr reflects on his tenure and controversial actions
item.description: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr, appointed by former President Donald Trump in January 2025, recently reflected on his legacy in an interview with The Financial Times. Carr expressed a somber view, acknowle...

item.title: Tanzania Reports Progress in Transport Sector During First 100 Days of New Government Term
item.description: During the first 100 days of the Sixth Phase Government’s second term, Tanzania’s Ministry of Transport has recorded significant progress in the country’s transport sector. Key achievements include si...

item.title: President Marcos Urges PMA Graduates to Uphold Constitutional Loyalty Amid Modern Threats
item.description: On May 16, 2026, President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. addressed the 207 graduates of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) Talang Dangal Class of 2026 during their commencement exercises at Fort Del Pilar i...

item.title: Aidan Turner Stars in Rivals Season Two With Notable Cameo from Pam St Clement
item.description: The highly anticipated second season of the bonkbuster series 'Rivals' premiered on Friday, and viewers were treated to a number of memorable moments. Irish actor Aidan Turner, 42, who plays Declan O'...

item.title: Filipino trafficking victims repatriated from Myanmar; Pasig visa consultancy shut down for illegal recruitment
item.description: Thirteen Filipino victims of human trafficking were repatriated from Myanmar to the Philippines, arriving at Ninoy Aquino International Airport Terminal 1 in Pasay via a Philippine Airlines flight fro...

item.title: Maldives Authorities Continue Search for Four Missing Italian Divers After Fatal Diving Accident
item.description: For the Maldives, search operation dey continue for four Italian divers wey go missing after one serious diving accident. Maldivian authorities don already find one body, but the remaining four still ...

item.title: Global Oil Disruption and Its Impact on Pakistan’s Economy
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US-Israel and Iran has triggered a major oil shock affecting the entire Middle East, global markets, and consumer prices. The Strait of Hormuz, through which 20% of th...

item.title: B.C. Men Face U.S. Charges for Smuggling Vietnamese Migrants Across the Border
item.description: U.S. authorities have formally charged two men from British Columbia with smuggling Vietnamese migrants into Washington state. According to reports, the operation involved transporting individuals acr...

item.title: Understanding Vitamin D: Why It Matters and When Supplements Are Needed
item.description: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin that acts like a hormone in the body, crucial for overall health. Nearly every cell has receptors for it, and it plays a key role in calcium absorption, bone strengt...

item.title: inDrive to Complete Financial Assistance Distribution for 11,000 Drivers Soon
item.description: Transport company inDrive is approaching the completion of its financial assistance program for around 11,000 drivers in the Philippines. The ayuda, aimed at helping drivers cope with rising fuel cost...

item.title: European Leaders Struggle with Popularity Amid Economic and Political Challenges
item.description: Recent polling indicates that several of Europe’s major leaders are experiencing historically low approval ratings, reflecting widespread public dissatisfaction. In the UK, Keir Starmer faces only 27%...

item.title: Students from UP and Assumption urge Senator Legarda to consider ethical leadership after Senate controversy
item.description: Students from the University of the Philippines and Assumption College have publicly called on Senator Loren Legarda to reflect on her values following recent developments in the Senate, described by ...

item.title: Guidelines and Prohibited Items for JEE Advanced 2026 Exam on 17th May

item.title: Confirmed Ebola outbreak reported in Ituri province, Congo
item.description: Africa CDC has confirmed an Ebola outbreak in the Ituri province of the Democratic Republic of Congo. As of Friday, May 15, 2026, about 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths have been reported, mainly in ...

item.title: Busia Pastor Recovers and Rebuilds Life With Support From Kenyans
item.description: In Busia County, Pastor Peter Musiyenga experienced a major setback when he claimed that praying for a sick man led to him suffering a stroke, causing him to lose some church members and struggle with...

item.title: Congo and Rwanda Compete for Leadership of Francophone Organisation Amid Eastern Conflict
item.description: Congo and Rwanda are set to clash diplomatically over the leadership of the International Organisation of La Francophonie (OIF). Both countries have presented candidates for the secretary general posi...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh High Court declares Bhojshala as a Saraswati temple, Hindu worship to begin
item.description: On Friday, the Indore bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court delivered a landmark verdict regarding the disputed Bhojshala Temple-Kamal Maula Mosque complex in Dhar district. The court recognised the ...

item.title: How to Navigate Disliking Your Friend’s Partner While Preserving Your Friendship
item.description: Disliking a friend’s partner is a common yet tricky situation. Experts advise first reflecting on your own feelings: sometimes jealousy, fear of losing the friend, or personal insecurities may amplify...

item.title: U.S. and Nigerian Forces Kill ISIS Leader Abu-Bilal al-Minuki in Joint Operation
item.description: Former President Donald Trump announced that U.S. and Nigerian forces successfully executed a joint operation that killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, whom he described as the second-in-command of ISIS global...

item.title: Joan Crawford’s Evolution Through Movie Magazine Covers, 1920s–1950s
item.description: Joan Crawford was a prominent figure on movie magazine covers from the late 1920s to the 1950s, reflecting the changing styles and glamour of Hollywood. In the 1920s, she was often portrayed as the en...
